elements.headline: Choose The Plan That's Right For You

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Start exploring. A complete experience for occasional use.

plans.name: Plus
plans.description: For your daily workflow. Remove all limits and make Craft your everyday creative home.

plans.name: Family
plans.description: Fixed-price bundle of 2 to 6 Plus accounts in a single subscription. Collaborate in a shared Space.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: Fixed-price with up to 10 Plus accounts in a single subscription. Collaborate in a shared Space.
